name: PM Awas Yojana (PMAY-G)
description: Housing scheme for rural poor to construct pucca houses with basic amenities.

steps_to_apply.action_en: Visit your local Gram Panchayat with Aadhaar.
steps_to_apply.action_local: ఆధార్‌తో మీ స్థానిక గ్రామ పంచాయతీని సందర్శించండి.

name: PM Kisan Samman Nidhi
description: Financial support of ₹6,000 per year for landholding farmers.

steps_to_apply.action_en: Visit pmkisan.gov.in and register under 'New Farmer Registration'.

name: Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY
description: Health insurance cover of up to ₹5 lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization.

steps_to_apply.action_en: Check eligibility on portal and visit empanelled hospital.

name: PM SVANidhi
description: Micro-credit facility for street vendors to resume their livelihoods with working capital loan up to ₹10,000.

steps_to_apply.action_en: Apply through PM SVANidhi portal or nearest CSC.
steps_to_apply.action_local: PM SVANidhi పోర్టల్ ద్వారా దరఖాస్తు చేయండి.

name: Pradhan Mantri Matru Vandana Yojana
description: Maternity benefit program providing ₹5,000 to pregnant and lactating mothers for first living child.

name: Stand-Up India
description: Bank loans between ₹10 lakh and ₹1 Crore to at least one SC or ST borrower and at least one woman borrower per bank branch for setting up a greenfield enterprise.

steps_to_apply.action_en: Apply through portal or visit bank branch.
steps_to_apply.action_local: పోర్టల్ ద్వారా లేదా బ్యాంక్ బ్రాంచ్‌ని సందర్శించి దరఖాస్తు చేయండి.

name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
description: Small deposit scheme for the girl child as part of 'Beti Bachao Beti Padhao' campaign.

steps_to_apply.action_en: Open account at Post Office or authorized bank.
steps_to_apply.action_local: పోస్ట్ ఆఫీస్ లేదా బ్యాంక్‌లో ఖాతా తెరవండి.

name: Kanyashree Prakalpa (West Bengal)
description: Conditional cash transfer scheme to improve the life and status of girls by helping them pursue higher studies.

name: Rythu Bandhu (Telangana)
description: Agriculture investment support scheme providing ₹5,000 per acre per season to farmers.

steps_to_apply.action_en: Submit details to village agriculture officer.

name: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana
description: Life insurance scheme of ₹2 lakhs for death due to any reason, premium of ₹436 per annum.

steps_to_apply.action_en: Enroll via your bank branch or net banking.
steps_to_apply.action_local: మీ బ్యాంక్ బ్రాంచ్ ద్వారా నమోదు చేయండి.

name: MGNREGA
description: Guarantees 100 days of wage employment in a financial year to a rural household whose adult members volunteer to do unskilled manual work.

steps_to_apply.action_en: Apply for Job Card at local Gram Panchayat.
steps_to_apply.action_local: స్థానిక గ్రామ పంచాయతీలో జాబ్ కార్డ్ కోసం దరఖాస్తు చేయండి.

name: Atal Pension Yojana (APY)
description: Pension scheme focused on the unorganized sector workers, guaranteeing a minimum pension of ₹1,000 to ₹5,000 per month.

steps_to_apply.action_en: Approach your bank branch to fill APY form.
steps_to_apply.action_local: APY ఫారమ్ నింపడానికి మీ బ్యాంక్‌కి వెళ్లండి.

name: PM UDAY
description: Conferment of ownership rights to residents of unauthorized colonies in Delhi.

name: Gruha Lakshmi Scheme (Karnataka)
description: Financial assistance of ₹2,000 per month to the woman head of a household.

steps_to_apply.action_en: Register at Grama One / Bangalore One center.

name: Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana (PMMY)
description: Loans up to ₹10 lakh to non-corporate, non-farm small/micro enterprises.

steps_to_apply.action_en: Approach nearest bank or apply via Udyamimitra portal.
steps_to_apply.action_local: సమీప బ్యాంక్ లేదా ఉద్యమిమిత్ర పోర్టల్ ద్వారా దరఖాస్తు చేయండి.
